meta.title: Practice Areas
meta.description: James M. Byrd defends clients in Criminal Law, Federal White Collar Crime, and DUI/DWI cases throughout Mobile, AL and surrounding counties. Call 251-438-2973.

hero.label: Legal Services
hero.title: Practice Areas
hero.subtitle: With more than four decades of dedicated criminal defense experience in Mobile, Alabama, James M. Byrd provides skilled, aggressive representation when the stakes are highest.

intro.text: Attorney Byrd is strictly a criminal defense lawyer. Since 1979 his practice has been 100% focused on criminal law, giving you the dedicated expertise your case deserves.

cards.heading: Criminal Defense Services
cards.subheading: James M. Byrd handles a focused range of serious criminal matters at both the state and federal level. Each case receives personal attention and a vigorous defense strategy.

items.title: Criminal Law
items.image_alt: Judge gavel and legal team meeting representing criminal defense
items.description: Facing a state criminal charge in Alabama can upend your life. Attorney Byrd has defended clients against the full spectrum of misdemeanor and felony charges since 1979, fighting to protect your freedom, your record, and your future.
highlights: Drug offenses, violent crimes, and theft
Pre-trial motions and jury trial representation

items.title: Federal Criminal Law / White Collar Crime
items.image_alt: Attorney consulting with client on federal criminal defense case
items.description: Federal investigations move fast and carry severe consequences. Mr. Byrd is licensed in the Southern District of Alabama, the Eleventh Circuit Court of Appeals, and The United States Supreme Court, and has decades of experience dismantling federal cases.
highlights: Wire, mail, bank, and healthcare fraud
Grand jury subpoena and pre-indictment counsel

items.title: DUI / DWI Defense
items.image_alt: Attorney reviewing DUI case documents in courtroom
items.description: A DUI conviction in Alabama means license suspension, fines, and possible jail time. Attorney Byrd scrutinizes every aspect of a DUI stop, from the legality of the traffic stop to breathalyzer calibration records, to build the strongest possible defense.
highlights: First, second, and felony DUI defense
Challenging breathalyzer and field sobriety tests
DUI involving drugs and commercial vehicles

items.title: Traffic Offenses
items.image_alt: Police car at night representing traffic offense defense
items.description: Paying a traffic ticket is an admission of guilt that can add points to your license, raise your insurance rates, and threaten your livelihood if you hold a CDL. Attorney Byrd reviews every citation and works to minimize or eliminate the consequences for drivers throughout South Alabama.
highlights: Speeding, reckless driving, and moving violations
Driving on a suspended or revoked license
Leaving the scene of an accident
